arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Hull City vs. Leeds United
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Hull City vs. Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Jones on the Hull City dressing room mood ahead of Leeds test
arts.sum: Alfie Jones admits there was a lot of anger and frustration inside Hull City's dressing room after they gifted three points to Middlesbrough on Wednesday night, and says it's vital the Tigers look to respond against Leeds United this afternoon. Few outside of the Tigers dressing room will give Ruben Selles' side much of a chance against the table-topping Whites, but Jones says a good starting point to being more competitive will be getting the press right and building from there.

arts.ttl: Hull City head coach Ruben Selles provides pre-Leeds United transfer update
arts.sum: Ruben Selles says the club remain hopeful of adding two new players in the coming days but admits they have run out of time to get the deals in place before Saturday's Yorkshire derby at home to Leeds United. While the FA Cup clash with Grant McCann's Rovers is obviously important, not having a league encounter for a couple of weeks does give the Tigers a little extra time to bring players and get them settled in before the trip to The Den later this month, something Selles is acutely aware of.

arts.ttl: Leeds United face competition from Man City for £20m star as Lusanne winger makes transfer decision
arts.sum: Around the country, you can hear the sound of managers keeping their cards close to their chest about their January transfer business - and that is no different at Leeds United. Mike Tresor is a name that has been linked with Leeds United the summer and once again in the current window, according to journalist Alan Nixon.

arts.ttl: 23/24 Leeds United target may be free to leave PL club this month
arts.sum: Leeds United tried for a left-back signing in 23/24 season but persisted with Junior Firpo and Sam Byram as their options, now Charlie Taylor could be available once more. Taylor left Leeds back in 2017 for Burnley, where he stayed at Turf Moor up until the summer of 2024, joining newly-promoted Southampton on a free transfer and two-year deal.

arts.ttl: Leeds United could see unlikely reunion, Archie Gray response and Crysencio Summerville claim
arts.sum: It was a busy summer for Leeds United after losing to Southampton in the Championship play-off final, with 14 players departing Elland Road permanently. A few players stayed in the Championship, some stepped up to the Premier League while others left England and joined clubs abroad.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke pinpoints how Leeds United plan to beat Sheffield United and Burnley to the title
arts.sum: Leeds are top of the pile at the beginning of 2025, a significant mental boost for Daniel Farke and his squad as they look to finish as title winners this season. Leeds United sit top of the league coming into their second game of 2025, and with that, will be optimistic of growing that gap to those behind them.

arts.ttl: Hull City given glimmer of relegation hope as Ruben Selles faces battle to stay in Championship
arts.sum: It might not feel like much of an achievement given the excitement of last season, but the latest supercomputer prediction has backed Hull City to stay in the Championship. City returned to the bottom three on Wednesday night as they kicked off 2025 with a stoppage-time defeat to Middlesbrough courtesy of Alex Gilbert's cool finish just as it looked like Ruben Selles' side would bag a valuable point and second clean sheet in a row.

arts.ttl: Louie Barry drops huge Aston Villa transfer hint as Leeds United sent cryptic message
arts.sum: Leeds United appear to have been dealt a slight blow to their hopes of signing Louie Barry in the January transfer window. The 21-year-old striker played his final game for Stockport County at the weekend before returning to Aston Villa – and he's already being heavily linked with another move .

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke has already given clear verdict on Leeds United transfer target
arts.sum: Elvedi played 32 league games and scored three times during Farke's one and only season with Die Fohlen. “Nico Elvedi is an absolute leader for us,” Farke said during his time at Monchengladbach.
